case_title: PAULINA KOSTA VS. PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL OF BOTH COMPLAINT AND CROSS COMPLAINT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 28, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT AND DEFENDANT/CROSS PLAINTIFF, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KOSTA, PAULINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 28, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT AND DEFENDANT/CROSS PLAINTIFF, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KOSTA, PAULINA AS TO DEFENDANT PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 28, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NEWLY MARKED EVIDENCE IS RETAINED / BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS / NO EXHIBIT JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $350.00) SERVED FEB-08-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC

AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.
